narrative:
Patterson Twp township has 890 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.5 percentage points.
